description: CompositionRed and black check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short sleeves, full buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron Do not iron on decorationsRefresh your wardrobe with this shirt from arrow.
